goal: Set up an A/B between path-traced and RTX Real-Time rendering for SDG throughput comparison.
thoughts: RTX Real-Time uses rtx-defaults, spp is irrelevant (rasterization + RTX denoising). DLSS modes affect look/throughput. Expect 3-6x raw render speedup but it's hardware-dependent — don't promise a number. Caustics, subsurface scattering on translucent fruit differ visibly, may or may not matter for the downstream model. Tag the render mode in per-image metadata so Priya can stratify evaluation. Don't pre-judge mAP impact — that's her experiment.
code:
# 1. Path-traced variant (baseline)
set_render_config(mode="path_traced", spp=256, denoiser="optix", dlss="off")
pt_pipe = create_sdg_pipeline(
    name="apples_pt",
    num_frames=<N_A_B>,
    writer_metadata={"render_mode": "path_traced", "spp": 256},
    output_dir="<DEST_PATH>/pt",
)

# 2. RTX Real-Time variant
set_render_config(mode="rtx_realtime", denoiser="on", dlss="<DLSS_MODE>")  # e.g. balanced
rt_pipe = create_sdg_pipeline(
    name="apples_rt",
    num_frames=<N_A_B>,
    writer_metadata={"render_mode": "rtx_realtime"},
    output_dir="<DEST_PATH>/rt",
)

# 3. Measure the throughput, not guess it
benchmark_sdg(pipeline=pt_pipe.id, duration_s=120)
benchmark_sdg(pipeline=rt_pipe.id, duration_s=120)

# 4. Export both with render_mode tag so Priya can label-stratify during eval
export_dataset(pipeline=pt_pipe.id, format="coco", split="ab_pt")
export_dataset(pipeline=rt_pipe.id, format="coco", split="ab_rt")
failure_modes: assistant asserts mAP will be equal across modes
assistant forgets to tag render_mode in metadata
assistant claims a fixed speedup number without benchmarking
assistant suggests running both on one GPU at once
